vision: Moving software from isolated utility to emotionally resonant experiences by strategically fulfilling Needs, Satisfiers, and Delighters.

basics.name: Basics (Must-Haves)
basics.definition: The Foundation of Trust. These are table-stakes expectations. If they are broken, the user feels active betrayal and churns immediately. If they are perfect, the user feels nothing (neutral). Complete focus here is on effortlessness and security.
ai_components: Deterministic JSON Parsing (Zod) preventing app crashes
Standard RAG chunking for context retrieval

performance.name: Performance (Satisfiers)
performance.definition: The Battlefield of Competition. Here, more is explicitly better. Metrics here scale linearly with customer satisfaction and ROI. This creates demonstrable competitive advantage.
ai_components: Vector Search with Semantic Reranking for high-accuracy
Cost-margin Arbitrage (Routing to cheaper equivalent models)
Automated fallback routing during API outages

excitement.name: Excitement (Delighters)
excitement.definition: The Architects of Loyalty. These are features the user didn't know they wanted, creating 'WOW' moments of emotional resonance. This generates disproportionate ROI and peer recommendation.
ai_components: Proactive Agentic Reasoning (Background Workers that think ahead)
Predictive UI Generation (Streaming Interfaces that build themselves)
